pr_text:
## Title: Remove commented dead code in ProtocolConfigurationOptions decoder

### Summary
Remove an obsolete commented-out line in the `decode_protocol_configuration_options()` function that represented dead code from a previous implementation attempt. This commented line incorrectly demonstrated parameter passing to the `IES_DECODE_U16` macro and was superseded by the correct implementation in the subsequent while loop. Its presence could mislead developers about the proper macro usage pattern.
